metadata.description: Self-hosted marketplace for the claude-statusbar plugin. Add with `/plugin marketplace add leeguooooo/claude-code-usage-bar`, then `/plugin install claude-statusbar`. The plugin wires the statusLine + slash commands; the render engine is the `cs` CLI from PyPI (`pip install claude-statusbar` or `uv tool install claude-statusbar`).

plugins.name: claude-statusbar
plugins.description: Lightweight Claude Code status-line monitor: 5h/7d rate-limit usage, reset timers, end-of-window projection (→NN%) + at-risk forecast, model + context window, prompt-cache countdown, optional session cost, project/branch (+ahead/behind, session lines/duration), a faint on-bar version with update hint, and an opt-in live-activity line (todos / active tool / subagents). 3 styles x 9 themes. Requires the `cs` CLI from PyPI.
